scripts.compile: npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json npx hardhat compile --config hardhat.config.cts
scripts.deploy: npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.cts --network eth-sepolia --config hardhat.config.cts
scripts.deploy:space: npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json npx hardhat run scripts/deploySpace.cts --network eth-sepolia --config hardhat.config.cts
scripts.deploy:treasury: npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json npx hardhat run scripts/deployTreasury.cts --network eth-sepolia --config hardhat.config.cts
scripts.deploy:v2: npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json npx hardhat run scripts/deployV2.cts --network eth-sepolia --config hardhat.config.cts
scripts.deploy:delegate: npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json npx hardhat run scripts/deployDelegate.cts --network eth-sepolia --config hardhat.config.cts
